profile.role_zh: 管理学院大三·焦虑型优等生
profile.innate_zh: 细心谨慎、规则意识强、记忆力好
profile.learned_zh: 四六级刷分和考证经历训练出的应试能力
profile.learned_en: Exam-grinding from CET and cert prep
profile.belief_zh: 按部就班才是最安全的
profile.belief_en: Step by step is the safe path
profile.goal_en: Pass first three CPA subjects; get internal admission
profile.contradiction_zh: 按计划活着很安全 vs 内心有一个声音说这样活着很无聊
profile.contradiction_en: Safety in routine vs. inner voice says it's boring
profile.deep_zh: 极度害怕不确定性，用考证填满不安
profile.deep_en: Terrified of uncertainty; fills it with certifications
profile.fear_zh: 脱离既定轨道后不知道怎么办
profile.fear_en: Not knowing what to do off-track
profile.desire_zh: 一种可以被量化的安全感
profile.rhythm_zh: 全天学习，间歇短暂休息
profile.rhythm_en: Studies all day with small breaks
profile.long_desire_en: Pass CPA accounting + auditing this semester
profile.constraint_zh: 学习时间已经接近极限；偶尔头痛
profile.constraint_en: Near her study limit; occasional headaches
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把社交看成浪费时间
profile.narrative_zh: 多考一个证就多一层保障
profile.narrative_en: One more cert = one more safety net
